targets.rawSql: SELECT date_bin('$__interval', "ts") AS time, "host", AVG("cpu_usage") AS "avg_cpu" FROM public.cpu_metrics_30 WHERE $__timeFilter("ts") GROUP BY time, "host" ORDER BY time

SELECT date_bin('$__interval', "ts") AS time, "host", MAX("cpu_usage") AS "max_cpu", MIN("cpu_usage") AS "min_cpu" FROM public.cpu_metrics_30 WHERE $__timeFilter("ts") GROUP BY time, "host" ORDER BY time

SELECT date_bin('$__interval', "ts") AS time, "region", SUM("cpu_usage") AS "sum_cpu", COUNT("cpu_usage") AS "rows" FROM public.cpu_metrics_30 WHERE $__timeFilter("ts") GROUP BY time, "region" ORDER BY time
SELECT date_bin('$__interval', "ts") AS time, "host", AVG("cpu_usage") AS "avg_cpu" FROM public.cpu_metrics_30 WHERE $__timeFilter("ts") GROUP BY time, "host" ORDER BY time

SELECT date_bin('$__interval', "ts") AS time, "host", AVG("cpu_usage") AS "avg", MAX("cpu_usage") AS "max", MIN("cpu_usage") AS "min" FROM public.cpu_metrics_30 WHERE $__timeFilter("ts") GROUP BY time, "host" ORDER BY time

SELECT date_bin('$__interval', "ts") AS time, "host", "region", COUNT("cpu_usage") AS "count", AVG("cpu_usage") AS "avg_sample" FROM public.cpu_metrics_30 WHERE $__timeFilter("ts") GROUP BY time, "host", "region" ORDER BY time
SELECT "ts" AS time, "host", "cpu_usage" FROM public.cpu_metrics_30 WHERE $__timeFilter("ts") ORDER BY time
SELECT "ts" AS time, "host", "region", "cpu_usage" FROM public.cpu_metrics_30 WHERE $__timeFilter("ts") ORDER BY time
SELECT date_bin('$__interval', "ts") AS time, AVG("cpu_usage") AS "val" FROM public.cpu_metrics_30 WHERE $__timeFilter("ts") GROUP BY time ORDER BY time
SELECT date_bin('$__interval', "ts") AS time, MAX("cpu_usage") AS "val" FROM public.cpu_metrics_30 WHERE $__timeFilter("ts") GROUP BY time ORDER BY time
SELECT date_bin('$__interval', "ts") AS time, MIN("cpu_usage") AS "val" FROM public.cpu_metrics_30 WHERE $__timeFilter("ts") GROUP BY time ORDER BY time
SELECT date_bin('$__interval', "ts") AS time, SUM("cpu_usage") AS "val" FROM public.cpu_metrics_30 WHERE $__timeFilter("ts") GROUP BY time ORDER BY time
SELECT date_bin('$__interval', "ts") AS time, COUNT("cpu_usage") AS "val" FROM public.cpu_metrics_30 WHERE $__timeFilter("ts") GROUP BY time ORDER BY time
SELECT date_bin('$__interval', "ts") AS time, "host", AVG("cpu_usage") AS "avg_cpu" FROM public.cpu_metrics_30 WHERE $__timeFilter("ts") AND ("host" = 'host-a') GROUP BY time, "host" ORDER BY time
SELECT date_bin('$__interval', "ts") AS time, "host", AVG("cpu_usage") AS "avg_cpu" FROM public.cpu_metrics_30 WHERE $__timeFilter("ts") AND ("host" != 'host-a') GROUP BY time, "host" ORDER BY time

SELECT date_bin('$__interval', "ts") AS time, "region", AVG("cpu_usage") AS "avg_cpu" FROM public.cpu_metrics_30 WHERE $__timeFilter("ts") AND ("region" LIKE 'us-%') GROUP BY time, "region" ORDER BY time

SELECT date_bin('$__interval', "ts") AS time, "host", AVG("cpu_usage") AS "avg_cpu" FROM public.cpu_metrics_30 WHERE $__timeFilter("ts") AND ("host" IN ('host-a', 'host-b')) GROUP BY time, "host" ORDER BY time

SELECT date_bin('$__interval', "ts") AS time, "host", "region", AVG("cpu_usage") AS "avg_cpu" FROM public.cpu_metrics_30 WHERE $__timeFilter("ts") AND ("host" = 'host-a' AND "region" = 'us-east') GROUP BY time, "host", "region" ORDER BY time

SELECT date_bin('$__interval', "ts") AS time, "host", AVG("cpu_usage") AS "avg_cpu" FROM public.cpu_metrics_30 WHERE $__timeFilter("ts") AND ("host" = 'host-a' OR "host" = 'host-b') GROUP BY time, "host" ORDER BY time
SELECT date_bin('$__interval', "ts") AS time, "host", AVG("cpu_usage") AS "avg_cpu" FROM public.cpu_metrics_30 WHERE $__timeFilter("ts") AND ("cpu_usage" > 50) GROUP BY time, "host" ORDER BY time

SELECT date_bin('$__interval', "ts") AS time, "region", AVG("cpu_usage") AS "avg_cpu" FROM public.cpu_metrics_30 WHERE $__timeFilter("ts") AND ("region" IS NOT NULL) GROUP BY time, "region" ORDER BY time
SELECT date_bin('$__interval', "ts") AS time, "host", AVG("cpu_usage") AS "avg_cpu" FROM public.cpu_metrics_30 WHERE $__timeFilter("ts") AND ("host" LIKE 'host-%') GROUP BY time, "host" ORDER BY time

SELECT date_bin('$__interval', "ts") AS time, "host", "region", AVG("cpu_usage") AS "avg_cpu" FROM public.cpu_metrics_30 WHERE $__timeFilter("ts") AND ("cpu_usage" > 30 AND "region" = 'us-east') GROUP BY time, "host", "region" ORDER BY time

SELECT date_bin('$__interval', "ts") AS time, "host", AVG("cpu_usage") AS "avg_cpu" FROM public.cpu_metrics_30 WHERE $__timeFilter("ts") AND ("cpu_usage" > 60 OR "cpu_usage" < 30) GROUP BY time, "host" ORDER BY time
SELECT date_bin('$__interval', timestamp) AS time, COUNT("timestamp") AS "count" FROM public.genai_conversations WHERE $__timeFilter("timestamp") GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT date_bin('$__interval', timestamp) AS time, "scope_name", COUNT("timestamp") AS "log_count", AVG("severity_number") AS "avg_severity" FROM public.genai_conversations WHERE $__timeFilter("timestamp") GROUP BY time, "scope_name" ORDER BY time

SELECT "timestamp", "service_name", "span_attributes.gen_ai.system", "resource_attributes.telemetry.sdk.name", "span_name" FROM "public"."opentelemetry_traces" WHERE $__timeFilter("timestamp") ORDER BY "timestamp" DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT date_bin('$__interval', timestamp) AS time, "span_attributes.gen_ai.system", COUNT("timestamp") AS "span_count" FROM "public"."opentelemetry_traces" WHERE $__timeFilter("timestamp") AND "span_attributes.gen_ai.system" IS NOT NULL GROUP BY time, "span_attributes.gen_ai.system" ORDER BY time

panels.title: Table: db.table + dot column filter test

targets.rawSql: SELECT "timestamp", "service_name", "span_attributes.gen_ai.system", "span_attributes.gen_ai.request.model", "resource_attributes.telemetry.sdk.name", "resource_attributes.telemetry.sdk.language" FROM "public"."opentelemetry_traces" WHERE $__timeFilter("timestamp") ORDER BY "timestamp" DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT COUNT("timestamp") AS "total_spans" FROM "public"."opentelemetry_traces" WHERE $__timeFilter("timestamp")
